audience_policies.source_phrase: Each pass admits up to 4 people for an Indoor Tour free of charge. This is a coupon pass and can be picked up at the Library up to 1 week in advance. coupon.source_phrase_block: Each pass admits up to 4 people for an Indoor Tour free of charge. This is a coupon pass and can be picked up at the Library up to 1 week in advance. You do not need to return this pass. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: $10 per person Purchased by the TPL using funding from the State Aid to Public Library program administered by the MA Board of Library Commissioners.
